title: subscription flag updated via string match on method name in write task
description: ws.rs write_task: json.contains(r#'"method":"subscription_active"'#) is used to detect subscription notifications and set subscribed_flag. This is a fragile string-match heuristic: if JSON serialization adds whitespace between the colon and the value (e.g. serde_json::to_string_pretty), or the method constant name ever changes, the flag never updates. The subscribed_flag would remain false for a paid user, blocking message sending until reconnect. A typed enum or channel message is safer.
